questions.q: The term '100 Crore Club' in Indian cinema refers to films that gross at least 100 crore rupees at which box office?
questions.explanation: The 100 Crore Club traditionally marks Hindi films grossing 100 crore or more at the domestic Indian box office.

questions.q: Which 2008 Aamir Khan film is widely credited with popularising the '100 Crore Club' milestone in Hindi cinema?
questions.explanation: Aamir Khan's 'Ghajini' (2008) is widely credited with popularising the 100 crore box-office milestone.

questions.q: Who directed the 2008 film 'Ghajini', the movie that popularised the 100 Crore Club?
questions.explanation: 'Ghajini' (2008) was directed by A. R. Murugadoss, who had earlier made the Tamil original.

questions.q: The Hindi film 'Ghajini' (2008) was a remake of a film originally made in which language?
questions.explanation: The 2008 Hindi 'Ghajini' was a remake of the 2005 Tamil film of the same name, also directed by A. R. Murugadoss.

questions.q: Which actor headlined 'Ghajini' (2008), the film often cited as the first major entrant of the Hindi 100 Crore Club?
questions.explanation: Aamir Khan starred in 'Ghajini' (2008), the film credited with launching the 100 crore conversation.

questions.q: The rise of the 100 Crore Club in Indian cinema is most associated with which decade?
questions.explanation: The 100 Crore Club became a common measure of commercial success through the 2010s.

questions.q: In the phrase '100 Crore Club', how many rupees does one crore represent?
questions.explanation: One crore equals ten million (10,000,000) rupees, so 100 crore equals one billion rupees.

questions.q: The 2009 Aamir Khan film that became a huge 100-crore-plus hit and was directed by Rajkumar Hirani was titled what?
questions.explanation: Rajkumar Hirani's '3 Idiots' (2009), starring Aamir Khan, was a landmark 100-crore-plus blockbuster.

questions.q: Reaching the 100 Crore Club is primarily a measure of a film's success in which area?
questions.explanation: The 100 Crore Club is a commercial benchmark based on box-office earnings, not critical or award recognition.

questions.q: Which of these is a higher box-office milestone that Indian films later began crossing after the 100 Crore Club became common?
questions.explanation: As grosses rose, Indian films began crossing far higher marks such as the 1000 Crore Club.

questions.q: Salman Khan's 2010 film 'Dabangg', an early 100-crore success, featured the hit song 'Munni Badnaam Hui' picturised on which actress?
questions.explanation: 'Munni Badnaam Hui' from 'Dabangg' (2010) was picturised on Malaika Arora.

questions.q: Which 2010 Salman Khan film, featuring his character Chulbul Pandey, was one of his first films to enter the 100 Crore Club?
questions.explanation: 'Dabangg' (2010), with Salman Khan as Chulbul Pandey, was a major 100-crore entrant.

questions.q: The 2013 release 'Chennai Express', which crossed 100 crore, paired Shah Rukh Khan with which actress?
questions.explanation: 'Chennai Express' (2013) starred Shah Rukh Khan opposite Deepika Padukone.

questions.q: Which director helmed the 2013 100-crore hit 'Chennai Express' starring Shah Rukh Khan?
questions.explanation: Rohit Shetty directed 'Chennai Express' (2013), one of the year's biggest commercial successes.

questions.q: The 2014 Aamir Khan film 'PK', a major 100-crore-plus earner, reunited him with which director?
questions.explanation: 'PK' (2014) reunited Aamir Khan with director Rajkumar Hirani after '3 Idiots'.

questions.q: Yash Raj Films' 2012 film 'Ek Tha Tiger', a 100-crore hit, starred Salman Khan opposite which actress?
questions.explanation: 'Ek Tha Tiger' (2012) paired Salman Khan with Katrina Kaif in the spy franchise.

questions.q: Which 2012 Yash Raj Films release, a 100-crore success, marked Shah Rukh Khan's reunion with director Yash Chopra?
questions.explanation: 'Jab Tak Hai Jaan' (2012) was Yash Chopra's final directorial, starring Shah Rukh Khan.

questions.q: The 2013 film 'Dhoom 3', a very high 100-crore-plus grosser, cast Aamir Khan as the antagonist opposite which Dhoom-series star?
questions.explanation: In 'Dhoom 3' (2013), Aamir Khan played the antagonist opposite Abhishek Bachchan's Jai Dixit.

questions.q: The growth of the 100 Crore Club in the 2010s was closely tied to the expansion of which exhibition format in India?
questions.explanation: The spread of multiplexes, alongside wide single-screen releases, helped drive higher box-office grosses.

questions.q: Which 2012 Akshay Kumar action film directed by Prabhu Deva was a 100-crore success and a remake of a Telugu hit?
questions.explanation: 'Rowdy Rathore' (2012), directed by Prabhu Deva and starring Akshay Kumar, was a 100-crore action hit remade from a Telugu film.

questions.q: The 2014 film 'Kick', which crossed 100 crore, starred Salman Khan opposite which leading actress?
questions.explanation: 'Kick' (2014) paired Salman Khan with Jacqueline Fernandez.

questions.q: Which 2015 Salman Khan film directed by Kabir Khan was a massive 100-crore-plus hit centred on a mute Pakistani girl?
questions.explanation: 'Bajrangi Bhaijaan' (2015), directed by Kabir Khan, was one of the year's biggest blockbusters.

questions.q: Aamir Khan's 2016 sports drama 'Dangal', which became one of Indian cinema's biggest earners, was based on the real-life story of which family?
questions.explanation: 'Dangal' (2016) was based on the Phogat family of wrestlers, led by Mahavir Singh Phogat.

questions.q: Before the 100 Crore Club became standard terminology, which 2001 Aamir Khan period sports film was an earlier benchmark of huge commercial and critical success?
questions.explanation: 'Lagaan' (2001) was a landmark hit and Oscar-nominated film, predating the 100-crore terminology.

questions.q: The 2014 film 'Happy New Year', a 100-crore grosser, was directed by Farah Khan and reunited her with which lead actor?
questions.explanation: Farah Khan directed Shah Rukh Khan in 'Happy New Year' (2014), after their earlier collaborations.

questions.q: Which 2011 Salman Khan film, a remake of a Malayalam movie, crossed 100 crore and featured him as a security guard named Lovely Singh?
questions.explanation: 'Bodyguard' (2011), where Salman Khan played Lovely Singh, was a remake of the Malayalam film and a 100-crore success.

questions.q: The 2013 film 'Krrish 3', which entered the 100 Crore Club, was directed by and starred which father-son pairing's elder member as director?
questions.explanation: 'Krrish 3' (2013) was directed by Rakesh Roshan and starred his son Hrithik Roshan.

questions.q: Critics of the 100 Crore Club metric have noted that headline gross figures can be inflated by which factor over the years?
questions.explanation: Rising ticket prices and inflation mean a 100-crore gross represents fewer admissions over time, a common critique of the metric.

questions.q: The 2011 superhero film 'Ra.One', which crossed the 100-crore mark, starred and was produced by which actor through Red Chillies Entertainment?
questions.explanation: 'Ra.One' (2011) was produced by Shah Rukh Khan's Red Chillies Entertainment and starred him.

questions.q: Which 2009 film starring Salman Khan and directed by Prabhu Deva, an action remake of a Telugu hit, is often listed among his early entries near the 100-crore era?
questions.explanation: 'Wanted' (2009), directed by Prabhu Deva and a remake of a Telugu film, revived Salman Khan's commercial run heading into the 100-crore era.
